programme.title: Heavy Load
programme.desc: Heavy transport in the rainforest. For the Sao Manoel hydroelectric power plant in the heart of Brazil, massive elements have to be delivered over a long and arduous route. The transformers weigh more than 200 tonnes each - the way to the destination, almost 4000 kilometres. Heat, dust and dirt roads that are completely dry and full of bumps. programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: With a low morale at camp, the teams must work together to safely rappel down a dangerous cliff, and face their coldest night thus far. With Robin and Wilson gone, the teams find a new pace, and realize an even playing field translates to stiffer competition.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara travels to Darwin, visiting markets and experiencing the local culture and delicacies, discovering strong influences from Asia.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara goes to Kakadu in the Northern Territory to learn about the Indigenous traditions of the area, including the wild herbs they use in their cooking.

programme.title: Don't Drive Here
programme.desc: It may be the backpacker's must-see, but if you go to the Venice of the East, don't drive!

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: The contestants are helicoptered to the top of a glacier, where they must navigate unforgiving terrain and dangerous crevasses. With high altitudes and fewer resources, the tasks become more demanding. Divided, the four remaining teams compete for a spot in the final journey.

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Down South, Lantern Recovery op Steve rescues a broken down 26-ton dustcart from a busy London street. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: An overturned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane mean trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. Working with the fire service he must all his experience to keep his team out of danger. Meanwhile with very little room to manoeuvre Lantern recovery op Steve must rescue a 44-ton artic stuck in a ditch on a busy five lane roundabout. And Lantern Recovery Op Sean has thought on his f

programme.title: David Attenborough A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Mission Survive
programme.desc: The five remaining celebrities are deep in the heart of the African bush, and with rations running low, Bear challenges them to choose from a selection of edible flora. But while some is a vital source of sustenance, others could kill them. After this, expedition leader Meg Hine pretends to be seriously injured and losing blood. The celebrities have only 40 minutes to make a stretcher and carry he

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Mission Survive
programme.desc: The celebrities move from the African bush to the coastal forest, where they must learn how to adapt to their new surroundings. Bear surprises the survivors by revealing they are camped only 30 feet away from three elephants - but their delight turns to disgust when they learn their first task - how to extract drinking fluid from the animals' dung to ensure survival in dire situations. programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. This duo goes 0 for 2 in the ring testing out their fight skills participating in traditional Tinku fighting and getting smacked down by Bolivia's Fighting Cholitas. They also face a sketchy ride up death rode just to mountain bike down an equally dangerous path. Catfish has yet to keep a meal down as our

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In the most action packed trip yet, Rooftop and Catfish's trip to Thailand has them face to face with the country's nature. They wrestle a crocodile, charm a cobra, and get a massage from an elephant that's somehow more relaxing than the traditional Thai massages they tried out. The two even attempt to catch (cooked) flying chickens on their heads. Things relaxed in Thailand for a moment when the

programme.title: Don't Drive Here
programme.desc: Getting around this city is like navigating a bee hive...except the bees are driving cars, trucks and trikes!

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn't stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya's spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 1996/97 UEFA Champions League final between Borussia Dortmund and Juventus in Munich. Armed with an expensively assembled squad, Juve were overwhelming favourites.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: Real Madrid went in search of their seventh European Cup title when they faced Juventus in the 1998 final in Amsterdam. The Serie A winners featured a 25-year-old Zinedine Zidane.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: A look back at the 1999/00 UEFA Champions League final between Real Madrid and Valencia in Paris. Steve McManaman, signed from Liverpool the previous summer, featured for Madrid.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the dramatic 2001 final between Bayern Munich and Valencia in Milan. Bayern, chasing their first title in a quarter-century, featured a 20-year-old Owen Hargreaves.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 2001/02 UEFA Champions League final saw a star-studded Real Madrid face Bayer Leverkusen in Glasgow. The match featured arguably the greatest goal in the competition's history.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003/04 UEFA Champions League final between Monaco and Porto in Gelsenkirchen. Jose Mourinho would leave Porto to take over at Chelsea just days later.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2011/12 UEFA Champions League final between Bayern Munich and Chelsea at the Allianz Arena. This was Chelsea's second final, having lost their first in 2008.

programme.title: Live: Men's Giro d'Italia
programme.desc: Coverage from the fourth stage of the race, a 138km route from Catanzaro to Cosenza. This stage last year saw a 189km route from Alberobello to Lecce that was won by Dutch cyclist Casper van Uden, as he picked up his one and only victory of the race. Great Britain's Simon Yates won last year's race ahead of Mexico's Isaac del Toro and Ecuador's Richard Carapaz.

programme.title: Kiff

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series

programme.desc: The cubs and their friends must practice.

programme.desc: Mencari Kedai Lejen ialah siri dokumentari yang mengangkat kisah pemilik F&B tempatan. Dua restoran, dua menu berlainan, berkongsi satu legasi kisah Aunty T's serta Rezeky Tomyam, dedikasi dan pengorbanan.

programme.title: Lawak Boss Boss Ep06

programme.title: Mael Lambong

programme.title: The Lucky Bini Show Ep05

programme.title: Live: Men's Giro d'Italia
programme.desc: Coverage from the fourth stage of the race, a 138km route from Catanzaro to Cosenza. This stage last year saw a 189km route from Alberobello to Lecce that was won by Dutch cyclist Casper van Uden, as he picked up his one and only victory of the race. Great Britain's Simon Yates won last year's race ahead of Mexico's Isaac del Toro and Ecuador's Richard Carapaz.

programme.desc: Atlanta Braves v Chicago Cubs (Start-time 12.15am). Coverage of the National League match from Truist Park. programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Aku Senang Kalo Kamu Bek Bek Aja?
programme.desc: Mela failed to marry Jordy because her father did not approve of it. Dion is my mother's son and quite rich to come to the village and meet Mela who is herding ducks. It turns out that her mother Dion and Mela were friends during college and intended to marry their child.

programme.desc: Despite coming from different family backgrounds, Yogi and Karin were met through an unexpected incident.

programme.title: Bidadari Surgamu
programme.desc: It tells the story of a girl named Sakinah who lives a life full of pressure due to slander and is forced to marry a person who does not love her.
